summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Marketing module. All 32 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified all 3 tabs (Create, Templates, History) working correctly with proper filtering, campaign creation, and template management.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: All marketing endpoints properly secured with authentication
Reference number generation (7-digit) working correctly for anti-ban protection
Background task for campaign sending implemented correctly with batch processing
Role-based pricing for product promotions working
seed_data_creation: Created test campaigns and templates during testing, then cancelled/cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing module fully tested. 3 tabs: Create (recipients filtering, campaign type selection, message composer), Templates (quick + custom templates with CRUD), History (campaign list with status and actions). Campaign sending uses real WhatsApp API (BotMasterSender) with batch delays for anti-ban. Each message gets unique 7-digit reference number. Existing campaigns in History: TEST_Product_Promo_Campaign (cancelled), TEST_Send_Campaign (completed), TEST_Marketing_Campaign (cancelled), Test Campaign (draft).

tests: Returns campaign statistics with total_campaigns, completed_campaigns, messages_sent_this_month
Creates new template with name, category, message, is_active
Returns campaigns list with total count
Creates campaign with recipients, message, batch settings
Creates product_promo with item_ids and item_details

elements_verified: Stats display (Total Campaigns, Messages This Month)
Campaign Type buttons (Product Promotion, Greetings, Announcement, Circular)
Quick Templates section (Diwali, New Year, Product Launch, Price Update)
Template modal with Name, Category, Message fields
Campaigns table with columns (Campaign, Type, Recipients, Progress, Status, Created, Actions)

recipient_filtering.flow: Changed entity filter to 'Doctors Only', changed status to 'Pipeline' - recipients list updated correctly

campaign_type_selection.flow: Clicked Product Promotion type - verified selection updates UI

template_modal.flow: Clicked New Template - modal opened with form fields, Cancel button closes modal
